log: You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
◇ THE BROADCAST — every radio in the sector played the same four seconds. The band has holes in it now.
— [dev] Scenario loaded: arc. 12★ prestige, day 30, kitted — the woman in the grey coat is waiting —
Odile Vance has taken to leaving the radio on at night. "So I'd notice," they say, "if it went quiet."
